The Papa Pasta Model

Small box.
Big margin.

Built for South African rental economics. Two operators, a 40-square-metre counter, and a menu trimmed to the pasta that actually sells. No freezers full of regret.

01 · Investment
R1.4mest.

Total investment range covers fit-out, equipment, franchise fee, and 90 days of working capital. Final figures pending finance review.

02 · Speed
11months

Modelled against a 40sqm inline unit in a high-footfall mall. Claim shown with the standard legal disclaimer on the Franchise page.

03 · Support
360°

Brand kits, supply chain, Zoho-driven lead nurture, seasonal drops — the franchisor carries the theatre so you can carry the margin.

The six-step journey

Curious visitor
to signed franchisee.

Start at step 1 →Skip ahead to the map
One crest, one city

Pick the colour.
Claim the block.

You don't browse a menu. You discover that the colour in your city hasn't been claimed yet.

Begin the game →
Papa Pasta

2 crew. 40sqm. 11-month payback. Fresh pasta QSR built for South African operators who want theatre, margin, and a crest of their own.
